chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5762 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No.25553/2024 (Exemption) 2. For order on CMA No.25554/2024 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 21.1.2026 --------------------- None present for the petitioner without intimation. This petition was filed on 11.11.2024. Record reflects that since inception i.e. 15.11.2024, nobody has bothered to put appearance and to assist this Court. Perhaps the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition diligently; therefore, this Court is left with no option, but to dismiss this petition in non-prosecution. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed / pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
